description: Experience the joys of spring with our beauty and personal care products, perfectly curated for the Easter season. Take advantage of our exceptional promotion, offering incredible sales on a wide range of cosmetics. Our newsletter keeps you updated with the latest in health and wellness trends and provides exclusive insights into our seasonal promotion. From revitalizing skincare products to vibrant makeup, our Easter sales are the perfect opportunity to refresh your beauty routine for the blooming season. With our product promotion, you can pamper yourself or your loved ones with high-quality cosmetics, making this Easter more beautiful than ever before. Don't miss out on our seasonal spring offers!
short_description: Celebrate spring with our Easter cosmetics sale. Explore a wide range of beauty and personal care products, from skincare to makeup. Stay updated with health and wellness trends through our newsletter. Don't miss our seasonal promotion for a refreshing beauty routine this spring.

designer.description: Hello, I'm Luana, a graphic and web designer with 8+ years of experience, specializing in email and landing page design. My approach is marked by precision, proactive problem-solving, and strong collaboration. I create visually impactful designs that align with marketing strategies, including social media graphics, blog covers, and presentations. I also offer custom design services tailored to clients' unique needs.

html_data:
Shop Best Seller Blog Contacts
 

Eggstra - Eggstra

EASTER SALES

30% OFF

Spring is in full bloom, and we're excited to bring you the latest beauty trends and essential products to help you look and feel your best this season. We have everything you need to achieve that fresh and glowing Easter look.

HURRY UP
 

Easter day sales

Get Your Glow on

Our team of beauty experts have curated the best products for you, along with helpful tips and tricks to help you make the most out of your beauty routine.

Coupon Code: HAPPYEASTER
 

Face Oil

The best face oils nourish the skin and provide other benefits, like antioxidant protection, anti-aging properties, and more.

SHOP NOW | 34$

Face Cream

Applying a face cream is a fundamental step in any beauty routine. Make sure you choose the right cream for your skin type.

SHOP NOW | 24$

Contour Eye Cream

 Our fragrance & cruelty free, powerfully targeted eye creams firm & revitalize your eyes.

SHOP NOW | 28$

Makeup Remover

Among testers, 100% found that the balm washed off easily and didn’t cause breakouts or irritation.

SHOP NOW | 12$
 

Cruelty Free

No Nasty Toxins

1% to Charity

Testimonials

What Our Customers Say

Lucas

I would highly recommend these products to anyone who is looking for high-quality skincare products that deliver real results.

Laura

The eye contour cream is a luxurious, rich cream that is specifically formulated for the delicate skin around the eyes.
